Video.summary: It's time for freestyle! This time, Monster Jam takes on Alltel Stadium in Jacksonville, FL during the 2001 season.
Video.title: Alltel Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: The high-octane energy of the Arena Championship Series East hits the Steel City as Monster Jam takes over PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh. This episode features elite drivers pushing their 12,000-pound machines to the limit in JCB Racing, the technical Skills Challenge, and a spectacular Freestyle finale. Watch as the intensity peaks with a high-stakes family showdown between Jon Zimmer and his son, Jon Zimmer Jr., and follow the inspiring journey of MJ Solorio as he transforms from a "super fan to superstar" behind the wheel of El Toro Loco. From the legendary rivalry of Grave Digger to Coty Saucier's masterful performance in Dragon, witness a night of shattered limits and epic dirt-shredding action.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

Video.summary: It's been 30 years of Monster Jam in Detroit, will Adam Anderson claim the series tonight?
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: Angel stadium hosts this weeks drivers for week six of the Championship Series.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Tune in LIVE as Monster Jam rolls into Huntington Bank Field in Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026
Video.title: LIVE: Monster Jam from Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026

Image.alt: LIVE: Monster Jam from Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam from Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026
LIVE: Monster Jam from Cleveland, OH - 5/2/2026

Video.summary: The competition is getting fierce as we near the end of the 2018 Monster Jam season.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA

Video.summary: The titans of Monster Jam have descended upon the motor capital of the world- Indianapolis. Don't miss the explosive racing action from the RCA Dome during Monster Jam's 2001 season!
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Racing

Video.summary: They may have lost the Ram's, but gained Monster Jam, check out all the action from the Edward Jones Dome in St. Louis.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 1 of the Stadium Championship Series at Ring Central Coliseum in Oakland, CA.
Video.title: Ring Central Coliseum - Oakland, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2020 season revs into Angel Stadium on January 11, 2020!
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: All the Monster Jam triple threat action from the Sprint Center on January 18, 2020!
Video.title: Sprint Center - Kansas City, MO

Video.summary: All the racing and freestyle action from Petco Park on February 15, 2020.
Video.title: Petco Park - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Check out all the Monster Jam racing action from Minneapolis, MN, on December 8, 2007!
Video.title: HHH Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2010 season races into Ford Field, on January 16, 2010.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2020 season continues with racing and freestyle action at the AT&T Stadium on February 29, 2020.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East continues its tear through the sunshine state as Tyler Menninga attempts to drive Grave Digger to back-to-back event championships. Meanwhile, Tristan England is undefeated on the Ray-J racetrack and looks to pilot JCB Digatron to a perfect racing record as Monster Jam continues in Tampa.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into MetLife Stadium on June 16, 2012 with racing fun!
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing

Image.alt: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing

Video.summary: The drivers head back to Florida as round 5 of the 2018 season continues at Marlins Park in Miami.
Video.title: Marlins Park - Miami, FL

Video.summary: Who will it be that steps up to the plate? Freestyle galore from the Citrus Bowl in Orlando, FL.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Ford Field is packed for all the thrilling racing action, on March 4, 2006.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Racing

Video.summary: Everything's bigger in Texas- the freestyle Monster Jam action from Houston, TX, on January 6, 2007, is gonna be huge!
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2005 season ender continues with all the freestyle action from Monster Jam World Finals 6 on March 19, 2005.
Video.title: World Finals VI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Image.alt: World Finals VI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals VI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals VI - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Video.summary: It all comes down to this: racing at Monster Jam World Finals 12 kicks off on March 26, 2011 with all your favorite trucks and drivers.
Video.title: World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals XII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Terminal Velocity’s Jon Zimmer Jr. looks to tighten the gap in the series points standings as Arena Championship Central heads to Cleveland, Ohio. Grave Digger's Matt Cody makes his 2023 domestic debut as he attempts to keep the points lead with the black and green wrecking machine.
Video.title: Rocket Mortgage Field House - Cleveland, OH

Image.alt: Rocket Mortgage Field House - Cleveland, OH
Rocket Mortgage Field House - Cleveland, OH
Rocket Mortgage Field House - Cleveland, OH

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into Resch Center for Round 14 of Arena in 30 - with freestyle and racing fun.
Video.title: Resch Center - Green Bay, WI

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series Central heads to New York as the series points battle continues at UBS Arena in Belmont Park. Scooby Doo’s Brianna Mahon and El Toro Loco’s Fernando Martinez attempt to chip away at the points lead held by Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson. The second-generation Grave Digger driver looks for his series-leading 17th event win.
Video.title: UBS Arena - Belmont Park, NY

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee, WI for more Monster Jam fun in Arena Series in 30!
Video.title: Fiserv Forum - Milwaukee, WI

Video.summary: Feel the ground shake as the 2026 Monster Jam season kicks off with a high-octane battle in Salt Lake City. Watch legendary icons like Grave Digger and Megalodon go head-to-head against reigning World Finals champion Blake Granger in Monster Mutt Dalmatian and Armando Castro, who is celebrating 25 years of El Toro Loco. From the precision of the Two-Wheel Skills Challenge to the adrenaline-fueled chaos of a Freestyle finale packed with backflips and drifting, these elite athletes push 12,000-pound machines to their absolute limits.
Video.title: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT
Delta Center - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.summary: Experience the "frozen tundra fury" of the Freestyle Mania Championship Series as Monster Jam takes over the Resch Center in Green Bay, Wisconsin. Local fan-favorite Mikayla Tulachka in Megalodon looks to defend her home turf against a field of elite competitors, including the "black and green wrecking machine" Weston Anderson in Grave Digger. The intensity reaches a fever pitch in the high-stakes JCB Racing competition, where turn-cone disqualifications and photo finishes determine who advances to the finals. As the engines roar, drivers push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit in a gravity-defying Best Trick contest and a chaotic Freestyle session where anything can happen.
Video.title: Resch Center - Green Bay, WI

Video.summary: Godzilla's got nothing on the Monster Jam trucks that crash into Tokyo.
Video.title: MetLife Dome - Tokyo, Japan

Video.summary: It’s a special international edition of Monster Jam from London Stadium. See the highly anticipated debut of the four Marvel Monster Jam trucks Thor, Ironman, Spider-Man, and Black Panther. See them go head-to-head against MaxD, Grave Digger, El Toro Loco, and Megalodon for the Overall Event Championship.
Video.title: London Stadium - London, England
